\tzpentry{ID5575}{Phase Field Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5575 introduces Phase Field Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \dot{\phi}_i = \Omega_i + K\,R(t)\,\sin\!\big(\Psi(t) - \phi_i\big)\,. \tag{9} \]
